# @uraniumtech/ui — component catalog for coding agents

Uranium Technologies design system. Import components from `@uraniumtech/ui`;
import tokens with `@import "@uraniumtech/ui/tokens.css"` in the consumer's global.css
(plus `@source "../../node_modules/@uraniumtech/ui/src";` so Tailwind v4 scans library classes).

RULES:
- Never re-implement anything listed here. If a needed component is missing, add it to
  the ut-ui repo (component + test + docs entry + manifest entry), tag a release, consume it.
- Never use raw hex colors, `bg-[#...]` arbitrary values, or Tailwind default palette colors
  (blue-*, indigo-*, purple-*, slate-*, gray-* surfaces). Use brand tokens:
  ink, petrol, petrol-light, steel, silver, reactor, isotope, glow, paper, gunmetal,
  surface-dark, border-dark, paper-text, amber-alert, rust — plus semantic ut-bg, ut-surface,
  ut-text, ut-muted, ut-border, ut-accent (theme-aware; prefer these).
- Dark mode: set `data-theme="dark"` on <html> or <body>. Semantic tokens flip automatically.
- Never call d3 directly in app code — use LineChart/BarChart.

## Button
import { Button } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
Brand button. variants: primary (petrol), accent (reactor green — max one per view), ghost.
REPLACES: any hand-styled <button>, .btn-* class soup.
PROPS: variant?='primary'|'accent'|'ghost'; size?='sm'|'md'; ...native button props
EXAMPLE: <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={reset}>Reset</Button>

## Kicker
import { Kicker } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
Uppercase letter-spaced section label flanked by rules (the "— ANALYTICS —" lockup).
REPLACES: hand-styled uppercase section labels.
PROPS: children; className?
EXAMPLE: <Kicker>Supply &amp; Demand</Kicker>

## Badge / StatusBadge
import { Badge, StatusBadge } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
Small uppercase chip; StatusBadge adds the hexagonal status dot (logo motif).
REPLACES: inline `bg-green-500/20 text-green-500` status pills.
PROPS: tone?='neutral'|'green'|'teal'|'petrol'|'amber'|'rust'; children
EXAMPLE: <StatusBadge tone="green">Operational</StatusBadge>

## Card
import { Card } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
Surface container: semantic bg/border, optional header row.
REPLACES: `bg-[#27293d] rounded-lg shadow-lg` divs, any hand-rolled card.
PROPS: title?; label? (small uppercase over title); headerContent? (right slot); live? (green glow, one per view); className?; children
EXAMPLE: <Card title="Forward Curve" label="Numerco" headerContent={<SegmentedControl .../>}>…</Card>

## PageHeader
import { PageHeader } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
h1 + optional kicker/description/actions row.
REPLACES: hand-rolled page title blocks.
PROPS: title; kicker?; description?; actions?
EXAMPLE: <PageHeader title="Reactor Data" kicker="IAEA PRIS" actions={<Button>Export</Button>} />

## StatCard
import { StatCard } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
KPI tile: mono tabular value, hexagon icon chip, sign-colored delta.
REPLACES: any stat/KPI tile; the old StatsCard (its `color` prop was broken — accent uses a static class lookup).
PROPS: value; label?; icon? (lucide component); accent?='green'|'teal'|'petrol'|'amber'|'rust'; delta?={value, format?}; footer?; live?
EXAMPLE: <StatCard value="$82.50" label="Spot U3O8" icon={TrendingUp} accent="green" delta={{ value: 1.25 }} />

## SegmentedControl
import { SegmentedControl } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
Filter toolbar (radiogroup + arrow keys).
REPLACES: rows of filter <button>s with active/inactive class ternaries (MAX/5Y/1Y/1M/1W pattern).
PROPS: options: (string | {value,label})[]; value; onChange; size?='sm'|'md'; ariaLabel (required)
EXAMPLE: <SegmentedControl options={['MAX','5Y','1Y','1M','1W']} value={range} onChange={setRange} ariaLabel="Time range" />

## Tabs
import { Tabs } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
Tablist with green active underline; children = active panel.
REPLACES: hand-rolled tab bars.
PROPS: tabs: {value,label}[]; value; onChange; ariaLabel; children?
EXAMPLE: <Tabs tabs={[{value:'us',label:'US'},{value:'eu',label:'EU'}]} value={r} onChange={setR} ariaLabel="Region">{panel}</Tabs>

## Tooltip
import { Tooltip } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
Hover/focus tooltip, no portal (works in Astro islands).
REPLACES: title= attributes, hand-rolled hover popups.
PROPS: content; side?='top'|'bottom'; children (single element)
EXAMPLE: <Tooltip content="lbs U3O8 equivalent"><button>?</button></Tooltip>

## ThemeToggle
import { ThemeToggle, themeInitScript } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
Light/dark/system 3-way switch (radiogroup). Persists to localStorage under "ut-theme",
resolves "system" against prefers-color-scheme and follows OS changes live. Sets
data-theme="light"|"dark" on <html>.
REPLACES: hand-rolled theme switches, manual data-theme toggling.
PROPS: className?
EXAMPLE: <ThemeToggle />
To avoid a flash of the wrong theme, inline `themeInitScript` in the document <head>
before any stylesheet/hydration, e.g. in Astro: <script is:inline set:html={themeInitScript} />

## DataTable
import { DataTable } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
Sortable table: sticky header, right-aligned mono numeric cells, empty state, a11y caption.
REPLACES: ANY raw <table>/thead/tbody markup.
PROPS: columns: {key, header, cell?, numeric?, sortable?, sortValue?, align?, width?}[];
  rows: T[]; getRowKey; defaultSort?={key,dir}; stickyHeader?=true; density?='normal'|'compact';
  onRowClick?; emptyState?; caption?
EXAMPLE:
  <DataTable rows={reactors} getRowKey={r => r.id} caption="Reactor list" columns={[
    { key: 'name', header: 'Reactor', sortable: true },
    { key: 'mwe', header: 'MWe', numeric: true, sortable: true },
  ]} />

## LineChart
import { LineChart } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
D3 line/area chart with brand axes, tooltip, HTML legend. x: string (point scale), number, or Date.
REPLACES: any d3.select/append code, chart.js, hand-rolled svg charts.
PROPS: series: {id, label?, data:{x,y}[], color? (palette token: petrol|sage|silver|isotope|amber|rust|glow|reactor), dashed?, area?}[];
  height?=360; yFormat?; grid?=true; tooltip?=true; legend?=true;
  zeroBaseline?=false (set true for volumes/totals; leave off for prices); ariaLabel (required)
EXAMPLE:
  <LineChart ariaLabel="U3O8 spot price" series={[
    { id: 'spot', label: 'Spot', area: true, data: prices.map(p => ({ x: p.date, y: p.usd })) },
    { id: 'fwd', label: 'Forward', color: 'sage', dashed: true, data: fwd },
  ]} />

## BarChart
import { BarChart } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
D3 bar chart; multiple series stack by default (stacked={false} groups them).
REPLACES: any d3 bar code, hand-rolled svg bars.
PROPS: series: {id, label?, color?, data:{category,value}[]}[]; stacked?=true; height?; yFormat?; legend?; tooltip?; ariaLabel (required)
EXAMPLE:
  <BarChart ariaLabel="Imports by origin" series={[
    { id: 'ca', label: 'Canada', data: caRows },
    { id: 'kz', label: 'Kazakhstan', data: kzRows },
  ]} />

## chartPalette / seriesColor
import { chartPalette, seriesColor } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
Brand chart colors keyed by token name. Use for any custom viz; never hardcode hex.

## useMeasure
import { useMeasure } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
ResizeObserver width hook used by the charts; reuse for custom responsive components.

## FormField
import { FormField } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
Label + hint/error wrapper around a single control. Clones its child to set aria-invalid.
REPLACES: hand-rolled label/error/hint markup around form controls.
PROPS: label; htmlFor; hint?; error?; children (single control element); className?
EXAMPLE: <FormField label="Quantity" htmlFor="qty" hint="In pounds U3O8"><Input id="qty" type="number" /></FormField>

## Input
import { Input } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
Text/number/email input. Numeric types render tabular mono digits. Pair with FormField.
REPLACES: hand-styled <input>, ad-hoc numeric formatting.
PROPS: icon? (leading icon slot); ...native input props
EXAMPLE: <Input type="number" icon={<DollarSign size={14} />} aria-label="Price" />

## Select
import { Select } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
Native <select>, brand-styled, with a chevron affordance.
REPLACES: hand-styled <select>, custom listbox re-implementations for simple option lists.
PROPS: options: {value,label}[]; value; onChange; ...native select props
EXAMPLE: <Select options={[{value:'u3o8',label:'U3O8'}]} value={m} onChange={setM} aria-label="Material" />

## Checkbox / Radio / Switch
import { Checkbox, Radio, Switch } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
Custom-styled checkbox, radio, and toggle switch (role="switch"), each label-wrapped.
REPLACES: raw <input type="checkbox"/radio">, hand-rolled toggle switches.
PROPS Checkbox: label; checked; onChange; disabled?
PROPS Radio: label; name; value; checked; onChange; disabled?
PROPS Switch: label; checked; onChange; disabled?
EXAMPLE: <Switch label="Live pricing" checked={live} onChange={setLive} />

## Modal / ConfirmDialog
import { Modal, ConfirmDialog } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
Focus-trapped, Escape/backdrop-to-close dialog via portal. ConfirmDialog is a preset for
destructive-action confirmation (Cancel/Confirm buttons).
REPLACES: SweetAlert, hand-rolled modal overlays, window.confirm.
PROPS Modal: open; onClose; title; children; className?
PROPS ConfirmDialog: open; onClose; onConfirm; title; message; confirmLabel?; cancelLabel?
EXAMPLE: <ConfirmDialog open={open} onClose={close} onConfirm={remove} title="Delete counterparty" message="This cannot be undone." />

## Toast / useToast
import { ToastProvider, useToast } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
Wrap the app once in <ToastProvider>; call showToast({message, tone?, durationMs?}) from useToast().
Renders a role="status" live region, auto-dismisses (default 4000ms).
REPLACES: SweetAlert/Notifications-style toasts, hand-rolled snackbars.
PROPS ToastInput: message; tone?='info'|'success'|'error'; durationMs?=4000
EXAMPLE: const { showToast } = useToast(); showToast({ message: "Contract saved", tone: "success" });

## Dropdown
import { Dropdown } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
Keyboard-navigable action menu anchored to a trigger element (row actions, user menu).
REPLACES: hand-rolled popover menus, ad-hoc absolutely-positioned action lists.
PROPS: trigger (single element); items: {label, onSelect, disabled?}[]; align?='start'|'end'
EXAMPLE: <Dropdown trigger={<Button size="sm">Actions</Button>} items={[{label:'Edit',onSelect:edit},{label:'Delete',onSelect:remove}]} />

## Tag / TagInput
import { Tag, TagInput } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
Tag is the only pill-shaped element allowed by brand rules. TagInput is a type-and-Enter editor.
REPLACES: hand-rolled removable chips, third-party tag-input libraries.
PROPS Tag: label; onRemove?; className?
PROPS TagInput: value: string[]; onChange; ariaLabel?; placeholder?
EXAMPLE: <TagInput value={materials} onChange={setMaterials} ariaLabel="Materials" />

## Slider
import { Slider } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
Single-thumb range slider (native <input type="range"> under the hood).
REPLACES: nouislider or other range-slider libraries, hand-rolled draggable sliders.
PROPS: min; max; value; onChange; step?=1; ariaLabel (required); showValue?
EXAMPLE: <Slider ariaLabel="Discount" min={0} max={10} step={0.5} value={discount} onChange={setDiscount} showValue />

## Pagination
import { Pagination } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
Prev/Next pager for use below DataTable. Renders nothing when pageCount<=1. Slice
`rows` by page yourself and pass the slice to DataTable — Pagination doesn't own the data.
REPLACES: hand-rolled page-number button rows.
PROPS: page; pageCount; onPageChange; className?
EXAMPLE: <Pagination page={page} pageCount={Math.ceil(rows.length/pageSize)} onPageChange={setPage} />

## Stepper
import { Stepper } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
Horizontal step indicator with hexagon markers (brand motif); completed/current/upcoming states.
REPLACES: hand-rolled wizard progress bars.
PROPS: steps: {label}[]; currentIndex; className?
EXAMPLE: <Stepper steps={[{label:'Counterparty'},{label:'Terms'},{label:'Review'}]} currentIndex={1} />

## Timeline
import { Timeline } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
Vertical activity feed: hexagon nodes on a hairline rail, mono timestamp, optional description.
REPLACES: hand-rolled activity/audit-log feeds.
PROPS: items: {id, title, timestamp, description?}[]; className?
EXAMPLE: <Timeline items={[{id:'1',title:'Call logged',timestamp:'2026-07-10'}]} />

## Avatar
import { Avatar } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
Hexagonal-framed avatar; renders an <img> when src is given, else initials from name.
REPLACES: hand-rolled circular avatar divs.
PROPS: name (required, used for initials/alt text); src?; size?='sm'|'md'|'lg'; className?
EXAMPLE: <Avatar name="Bryan Corder" size="sm" />

## DatePicker
import { DatePicker } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
Styled native <input type="date">, mono tabular digits. v1 scope — swap for a month-popover
build if a project needs one; shares date math with Calendar.
REPLACES: hand-styled <input type="date">, third-party date-picker libraries for simple cases.
PROPS: value (ISO date string); onChange; ariaLabel (required); min?; max?; className?
EXAMPLE: <DatePicker ariaLabel="Delivery date" value={date} onChange={setDate} />

## Calendar
import { Calendar } from '@uraniumtech/ui'
Month-grid calendar. Caller controls the displayed month (onNavigate) and owns event data.
REPLACES: FullCalendar and similar third-party calendar libraries for a simple month view.
PROPS: year; month (1-12); events: {date (ISO), label}[]; onNavigate: (dir:'prev'|'next')=>void; onDateClick?; className?
EXAMPLE: <Calendar year={2026} month={7} events={deliveries} onNavigate={nav} onDateClick={openDay} />
